title: dasystephana lagodechiana
intro: Dasystephana lagodechiana, also known as the Himalayan rose, is a flowering plant belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dasystephana lagodechiana include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
